title: IRS Issues Standard Mileage Rates for 2023
summary: The IRS issued the 2023 optional standard mileage rates used to calculate the deductible costs of operating an automobile for business, charitable, medical, or moving purposes. Beginning January 1, 2023, the standard mileage rates for the use of a car (also vans, pickups or panel trucks) will be: 65...

title: AVO Radio, Fridays at 4:30 p.m. on KUAC FM
summary: Join the Alaska Volcano Observatory’s Cheryl Cameron, Kate Bull, and Scott Crass for reports on the state’s volcanic activities. Listen Fridays at 4:30 on KUAC 89.9 FM or stream stream online .
